attributes.name: Calorie Counter Card Definition
attributes.summary: The CalorieCounter is a comprehensive card-based tool designed for tracking daily calorie intake and nutritional macro breakdowns. It provides various embedded views to monitor progress toward daily goals, display meal entries, and summarize macro nutrients (protein, carbs, fat, and calories). The card supports multiple formats, including a dashboard view, compact fitted layout with multiple subformats, and an isolated, scrollable quick-add interface. It enables users to set daily calorie goals, record meals with detailed macro information, and visualize progress through progress bars and summaries to facilitate effective dietary tracking.
